changes.description: Extended lifecycle state machine: added OBSERVED, CAPABILITY_CANDIDATE, MODULE_CANDIDATE states. Added OPERATOR_REQUIRED_TRANSITIONS set and EMERGENCE_THRESHOLD constant. Extended CONSUMPTION_ELIGIBLE_STATES to include CAPABILITY_CANDIDATE and MODULE_CANDIDATE.

LearningPromoter — governed operator for learning lifecycle transitions. 7 transition methods (review, reject, promote, activate, elevate_to_capability, elevate_to_module, supersede). AI actor rejection enforcement. 3-specimen threshold for CAPABILITY_CANDIDATE. batch_review for multi-event governance. get_promotable for grouped event query. Session transition log.

Added emit_learning_promotion() method. Maps target states to semantic phases (REVIEWED→FORMATION, PROMOTED→STRENGTHENING, CONSUMABLE→STABILIZATION, CAPABILITY_CANDIDATE→CONVERGENCE, MODULE_CANDIDATE→PROJECTION, REJECTED/SUPERSEDED→TENSION). Tracks learning_events_captured manifest counter.
File change manifest for GEN-4 stream.
Closure document with G1 architecture memory propagation.
G1 vault propagation — GEN-4 status SPECIFIED_NOT_IMPLEMENTED → OPERATIONAL, learning-to-capability pipeline maturity updated, stream lineage entry added.
